title: BCTweaks
description: A Minecraft beta 1.7.3 texture pack that tosses things up, but hopefully keeps the beta charm.
body:
BCTweaks is a ~~work in progress~~ minecraft beta 1.7.3 texture pack, originally this was just a personal project for me and some friends but recently it has grown in popularity. I try to not make any of the changes _major_.
This texture pack uses immersive beta as a base, which can be found on planet minecraft
